what: Display knowledge entries grouped by category as a collapsible tree
why: Gives the user a clear structural overview of vault content organized by category

success_handling.criteria: Knowledge tree is rendered with entries grouped by category

decisions.reason: Group by category field on KnowledgeEntry
decisions.rationale: Category is the primary organizational axis; grouping creates a meaningful hierarchy without extra backend logic

decisions.reason: Edit button only visible on hover
decisions.rationale: Keeps the tree uncluttered; power users find it on hover
